General.Name: NXDR
General.Description: Nextdoor Holdings, Inc. operates a neighborhood network that connects neighbors, businesses, and public agencies in the United States and internationally. The company provides local news, events, relevant discussions, and exchange goods and services, as well as discovers and supports local businesses. It operates in 11 countries. The company is headquartered in San Francisco, California.
General.Address: 420 Taylor Street, San Francisco, CA, United States, 94102
